# I18n Workflow

This file is generated by the local i18n workflow scripts.

- `pnpm run sync:package-nls` / `pnpm run sync:webview-nls` / `pnpm run sync:formatter-nls` / `pnpm run sync:quickpicks-nls` refresh extraction outputs.
- `pnpm run promote:package-nls:zh-cn` / `pnpm run promote:webview-nls:zh-cn` / `pnpm run promote:formatter-nls:zh-cn` / `pnpm run promote:quickpicks-nls:zh-cn` promote approved translations into authority.
- `pnpm run generate:package-nls` / `pnpm run generate:webview-nls` / `pnpm run generate:formatter-nls` / `pnpm run generate:quickpicks-nls` generate localized artifacts from authority.
- Extension builds run the runtime dynamic source generator and inject `.work/i18n/runtime-dynamic-sources/zh-cn/{formatter,quickpicks}/**` through webpack without editing upstream `src/**` call sites.
